mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS rate transmits through lower discount rates and easier financial conditions, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when CPIAUCSL is stable, because falling policy rates without rising inflation reduce the odds of imminent tightening.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are not positive in more than 55% of periods with a 3-month FEDFUNDS decline and stable CPIAUCSL, or if the conditional Rank IC stays below 0.03 for any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and weaker demand, which should pressure earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect is directional and testable by comparing periods of unemployment acceleration to subsequent index performance.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 20d SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 standard deviation.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained acceleration in RSAFS indicates improving consumer spending and revenue momentum, which should translate into positive near-term equity returns as analysts revise sales and earnings expectations upward. The mechanism should be visible even without other macro inputs.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS grows faster than its 6-month average for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if accelerated RSAFS periods do not produce higher 20d SPX returns than non-accelerating periods, or if triggered Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Improving INDPRO growth reflects rising industrial output and better cyclical supply-side momentum, which should support equity prices through stronger profit expectations and reduced recession odds. Positive forward returns should be concentrated when production is expanding after prior weakness.
failure_condition: Reject if 60d forward SPX returns are not higher after positive 3-month INDPRO growth than after negative growth, or if the sign relation flips for more than one 2-year rolling subsample.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in HOUST and PAYEMS signals housing-led labor income expansion, which should improve consumer confidence and support positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal depends on both housing activity and payroll growth, not either series alone.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST-PAYEMS signal does not outperform each single-series effect in out-of-sample testing, or if positive 20d returns are not more frequent when both series rise together.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains near the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL is firming, investors infer prolonged accommodation with limited near-term tightening risk, which supports equity valuations and positive 20-day returns. The signal fails if inflation accelerates enough to force rate-hike expectations.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25% and CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered episodes do not show a positive average 5d SPX return, or if rising CPIAUCSL under zero rates is followed by negative returns more often than positive returns.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS series signals payroll contraction and weaker corporate revenue visibility, which should depress equity prices over the next quarter as analysts cut earnings forecasts. The effect should be clearest when payroll losses persist for multiple months.
failure_condition: Reject if two-month payroll declines do not precede below-baseline 60d SPX returns, or if the triggered hit rate for negative returns stays below 55% in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized improvement in GDPC1 and RSAFS indicates broad real activity and final demand strength, which should raise earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The claim is falsified if growth in one series does not reinforce the other.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDPC1-RSAFS upturns do not outperform single-series upturns on 60d SPX returns, or if positive returns are not more frequent when both indicators improve together.
